rationale: The plan is ready for plan approval under the falsifiability lens. Every Verification checkbox in Beads 1-4 contains a runnable exit-status shell command. Every named new targeted test uses the required `go test -v -run ... | grep -q -- '--- PASS: ...'` PASS-line pattern. Bead 3 covers all three ownership-load call sites with separate tests for `ValidateDivergence`, `checkInternalPackages`, and `normalizeImpactedDomains`. The countable ownership seam is planned as a new package-level counter or injectable loader around existing `loadOwnershipForRef`; ADR reads are countable through the existing `adr.Store` interface with a planned memoizing/counting wrapper around `adrStoreForSpec`; Bead 4 explicitly creates `walkWorkspaceFn = filepath.WalkDir`. The disclosed post-approval spec edit is mechanical: it changes only impacted-domain bullet parsing syntax and attribution-note markers, not semantics. `mindspec validate spec 108-cleanup-frontmatter-perf-wave2` exits with only the expected lifecycle-binding warning.

findings.detail: The ownership-load seam is left as either a package-level counter or injectable loader rather than a fixed symbol name. This is still falsifiable because the plan requires creating the seam and proving all three call sites with separate PASS-line tests.
